query:
SELECT DISTINCT m.indication
FROM medications m
LEFT JOIN medication_icd_mapping mim ON m.id = mim.medication_id
WHERE m.indication IS NOT NULL 
  AND m.indication != ''
  AND mim.medication_id IS NULL
ORDER BY m.indication
